---
about:
  template: trestles
  image: wss.jpg
  image-shape: rounded
  links:
    - icon: linkedin
      text: linkedin
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/washingtonssilva/
    - icon: envelope
      text: e-mail
      href: mailto:washington.silva@ifmg.edu.br
---

**Washington Santos da Silva, Phd.** <br>
Full Professor and Researcher at <a href = "https://www.formiga.ifmg.edu.br" target="_blank">IFMG - Campus Formiga</a>. Minas Gerais, Brazil.<br>

:::: {.columns}

::: {.column width="50%"}

<ul class="fa-ul">

  <li><a href="http://lattes.cnpq.br/7319553236390710" target="_blank"><i class="fa-li ai ai-google-scholar" style="padding-top:4px;"></i>CV Lattes</a></li>

  <li><a href="https://orcid.org/0000-0003-2396-3507" target="_blank"><i class="fa-li ai ai-orcid" style="padding-top:4px;"></i>ORCID</a></li>
  
</ul>

:::

::: {.column width="50%"}

<ul class="fa-ul">

  <li><a href="https://scholar.google.com.br/citations?hl=pt-BR&user=hRQ0bCIAAAAJ" target="_blank"><i class="fa-li ai ai-google-scholar" style="padding-top:4px;"></i>Google Scholar</a></li>
  
  <li><a href="https://github.com/washingtonsilva" target="_blank"><i class="fa-li fa-brands fa-github"></i>GitHub</a></li>

</ul>

:::

::::
